summary: Phase 55 Testing: Fill In Badge visibility, Previous button navigation, and font size clamping. Fill In badge is visible and NOT clipped (67x28 px dimensions). Previous button appears after navigating past first field. Font size clamping logic verified in both frontend and backend. CRITICAL BUG: 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error in console causing performance issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded - React infinite loop error in console. Likely caused by useEffect in useGuidedFillIn.js (line 211) that has activeFieldId in dependency array and calls setActiveFieldId inside, or onHiddenFieldsChange callback in InteractiveDocumentViewer.js (line 386)
Previous button visible on first field when it should be hidden. The showPrev logic (line 849) checks prevCurrentIdx > 0, but the activeFieldId may not be the first in navigableFieldIds array

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Investigate and fix 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error - likely in useGuidedFillIn.js useEffect (line 211) or InteractiveDocumentViewer.js onHiddenFieldsChange callback (line 386)
FIX MEDIUM: Previous button showing on first field - verify activeFieldId is correctly set to first navigable field on Start
critical_code_review_comments: useGuidedFillIn.js line 211-234: useEffect has activeFieldId in dependency array and calls setActiveFieldId inside - potential infinite loop source
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js line 385-387: onHiddenFieldsChange callback may trigger parent re-render that updates fields, causing hiddenFieldIds to change again
Font size clamping logic is correctly implemented in both frontend (resolveResponsiveFontSize) and backend (package_public_routes.py lines 643-646, 697-700)

success_rate.frontend: 80% (Fill In badge and navigation work, but React infinite loop error present)
